## Checklist

- [ ] `.docs/` updated if install, config, or architecture changed
- [ ] No secrets committed (`application/config.php`, API keys, passwords)
- [ ] `config.example.php` updated if new config keys added
- [ ] Tested locally or on Debian test VM (if applicable)
